packs.name: arklint/fastapi
packs.description: FastAPI best practices - routers, services, schemas, settings, and layered architecture

packs.name: arklint/django
packs.description: Django conventions - views, models, serializers, Celery tasks, signals, no raw SQL

packs.name: arklint/flask
packs.description: Flask best practices - blueprints, service layer, config management, no debug in prod

packs.name: arklint/nextjs
packs.description: Next.js App Router conventions - server/client boundaries, API routes, env vars, state management

packs.name: arklint/express
packs.description: Express.js patterns - middleware, routes/controllers/services separation, layered architecture

packs.name: arklint/nestjs
packs.description: NestJS conventions - controller/service/repository separation, DI patterns, single ORM

packs.name: arklint/spring
packs.description: Spring Boot conventions - Controller/Service/Repository layers, constructor injection, DTO placement

packs.name: arklint/clean-arch
packs.description: Generic clean architecture - entities, use cases, interfaces, infrastructure layer boundaries

packs.name: arklint/security
packs.description: Security guardrails - bans eval/exec, unsafe deserialization, shell injection, innerHTML, SQL concatenation

packs.name: arklint/code-hygiene
packs.description: Code hygiene - bans TODO comments, debug breakpoints, sleep in tests, scattered test files
